---
title: "rot13_encoder.py"
path: "C:/Users/Craig/Corvus/CorvusStar/skills_db/rot13_encoder/rot13_encoder.py"
loc: 14
complexity: 5
logic_score: 5.30
style_score: 4.72
intel_score: 1.40
overall_score: 4.34
---

## Intent
Python module facilitating rot13. It exists to support broader Python integration routines. Its role in the system is to provide foundational utilities for script execution.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 5.3/10
- **Style [S]**: 4.7/10
- **Intel [I]**: 1.4/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 4 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [sys](file://sys)

### Exports
- `rot13`
